h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner follows the tutor's guidance to correctly label the tile.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Top 6: atomic number, identifies carbon. C for the symbol; carbon for the name. Bottom 12.01: atomic mass entry.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: Learner independently places all four cards without overlay prompts, demonstrating task mastery.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Now one slot has no answer. The symbol space holds C, but the overlay still asks two questions: which number names the element, and which number gives the mass entry? Put one number back, then name the job of 6.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: Tutor removes mass card to create a cognitive puzzle, forcing distinction between atomic number and atomic mass.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityEvidence: Now one slot has no answer. The symbol space holds C, but the overlay still asks two questions: which number names the element, and which number gives the mass entry? Put one number back, then name the job of 6.
scored.adaptiveMechanismQualityJustification: The empty-slot task is precise, directly addresses the learner's confusion, and provides an operational criterion for distinguishing the two numbers.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No learner reframing occurs, so no adaptive uptake is needed.
